I'm a Teapot – Useless HTCPCP Browser Simulator (418 I'm a Teapot) A single-file, completely pointless HTCPCP client that refuses to brew coffee. Built for the DEV April Fools Challenge 2026. Features:  Real HTTP/1.1 418 responses with sarcastic RFC quotes Animated teapot (boils, dances, pours nothing) Shake your phone to stir (DeviceMotion) Retro 1998 styling + live request log Full ode to Larry Masinter  Zero dependencies. Works offline. Solves literally nothing. Just open the HTML file and try to BREW coffee. I dare you. 🫖 #HTCPCP #418 #AprilFools #IYKYK
